nasb.text: The priest shall bring it to the altar, and wring off its head and offer it up in smoke on the altar; and its blood is to be drained out on the side of the altar.

esv.text: And the priest shall bring it to the altar and wring off its head and burn it on the altar. Its blood shall be drained out on the side of the altar.

cnv.text: 祭司要把鳥帶到祭壇那裡，扭下牠的頭來，焚燒在祭壇上；又把鳥血擠出來，流在祭壇的壁上；

ccb.text: 祭司要把鸟带到祭坛前，拧下鸟头，放在祭坛上焚烧；要在祭坛旁放尽鸟血；
